introSection: Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Funcoast World in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. Based on pictures, it is likely that the coaster was built by either Supercar or B. A. Schiff & Associates.
fullText: Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Funcoast World in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. Based on pictures, it is likely that the coaster was built by either Supercar or B. A. Schiff & Associates.
